name: printer-status
title: Printer Status
description: Check printer status (page counts, ink levels, device info) via SNMP
author: davidyannick

commands.name: xerox
commands.title: Printer Status
commands.description: Show current page counts and status for the configured printer

tools.name: ask-xerox
tools.title: Ask Printer
tools.description: Retrieve current status, ink levels, page counts, and device information from the configured printer

preferences.name: printerIp
preferences.title: Printer IP Address
preferences.description: The IP address of your printer

preferences.name: snmpCommunity
preferences.title: SNMP Community String
preferences.description: The SNMP community string for your printer (default: public)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
